ItacPersonItem.Notes: Jurist, and founder of the Confusi Academy, according to Maylender. This person should not be confused with his namesake, a philosopher, and teacher at the University of Ferrara.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
